name: harness-lab
description: AI 项目的研发治理层模板

scripts.lint: node -e "console.error('Harness Lab keeps lint as a template guard. Bind a real lint command in the target project; see README.md -> 快速开始 -> 绑定真实命令.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.test: node -e "console.error('Harness Lab keeps test as a template guard. Bind a real test command in the target project; see README.md -> 快速开始 -> 绑定真实命令.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.build: node -e "console.error('Harness Lab keeps build as a template guard. Bind a real build command in the target project; see README.md -> 快速开始 -> 绑定真实命令.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.verify: node -e "console.error('Harness Lab keeps verify as a template guard. In this repository, run npm run check:governance; in a target project, bind a real verify chain as documented in README.md.'); process.exit(1)"

author: Harness Lab contributors
